entity.summary: Historical centralized cryptocurrency exchange preserved in external exchange registry data.
entity.notes: CoinPaprika preserves Bits Blockchain as an inactive exchange. A reliable first-party domain, jurisdiction, launch date, terminal date, and shutdown cause were not recovered in this review, so HEI leaves those fields unset rather than inferring them.

evidence.title: Bits Blockchain exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Entity-specific registry entry preserves the Bits Blockchain exchange identity and inactive classification.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange registry corpus
evidence.notes: The exchange registry corpus independently preserves Bits Blockchain as a named exchange record. No first-party lifecycle date is inferred from this source.
